# Ceramic Ware Care & Preservation Guide

Handmade pottery requires mindful care to preserve its glaze lustre and thermal shock resistance.

## Care Best Practices

1. **Washing**: Hand wash with mild detergent and warm water. Avoid sudden temperature shifts.
2. **Microwave & Oven Safety**: High-fired stoneware is food-safe and heat-resistant, but rapid heating should be avoided.
3. **Storage**: Stack vessels with linen dividers to prevent rim abrasion.

Return to our [Wheel-Thrown Collection](collection/wheel-thrown-vessels.md) or read our latest studio entry on [Glazing Techniques](journal/2026-07-15-glazing-techniques.md).
